title: Fetola senotlolo
subtitle: Ntlafatsa tshireletso ya akhaonto ya hao
requirements: E tšwanetse ho ba le 8+ char, litlhaku tse kholo, litlhaku tse nyane, nomoro le char e khethehileng

messages.error: Phoso e etsahetse. Ka kopo, leka hape.
messages.mismatch: Li-password tse ncha ha li lumellane
messages.invalid: Lekunutu le tlameha ho ba le bonyane litlhaku tse 8, tlhaku e le 'ngoe e kholo, tlhaku e le 'ngoe e nyane, nomoro e le 'ngoe le litlhaku tse ikhethang.
